mapper.sql: note_id, author_id, note_type, note_status, visibility, current_version, latest_version, cover_file_id, comment_enabled, published_at, last_edited_at, offline_reason, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_note.note WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM bluenote_note.note WHERE deleted = 0 AND note_id IN
#{noteId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_note.note SET note_status = #{noteStatus}, visibility = #{visibility}, published_at = #{publishedAt}, last_edited_at = #{updatedAt}, current_version = latest_version, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND note_status = 'DRAFT' AND deleted = 0
UPDATE bluenote_note.note SET note_status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = 1 WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND author_id = #{authorId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_note.note WHERE author_id = #{authorId} AND note_status = 'PUBLISHED' AND visibility = 'PUBLIC' AND deleted = 0
